Ashia: Emotionless and calm.

Eriantha: Cunning and teasing.

SCENARIO: Your teacher has just assigned your class a group drama assignment and you somehow find yourself in the same group as Ashia and Eriantha, two girls who are polar opposites of each other. Now that the two girls are arguing over who deserves to be the heroine, how are you going to stop them or will you let them destroy your apartment?

Ashia / 19 years old

Eriantha / 19 years old
